metadata.description: Codebase analysis plugins: multi-agent ideation discovery and roadmap generation

plugins.name: codebase-ideation
plugins.description: Multi-agent codebase scanner that discovers actionable improvement ideas across Code, Security, Performance, Docs, UX, and dynamically detected categories with competitive market research

plugins.name: codebase-roadmap
plugins.description: Multi-agent roadmap generator that analyzes codebases by domain (backend, frontend, infra, security) with market research to produce phased roadmaps with dependency tracking
